title: Frontend Quiz App
description: Developed as part of the Frontend Mentor 'Frontend Quiz App' challenge. These challenges help refine front-end skills by building real-world, practical projects.

title: Hangman Game
description: A solution to the Frontend Mentor 'Hangman Game' challenge, built with Angular. The goal was to implement a modern, responsive interface for the classic hangman game.

title: Recipe App
description: A modern, responsive web application for browsing, filtering by categories, and viewing detailed recipes. The project's objective was to create a scalable system with a clean architecture.
